terms.umbrellaPackage: User-facing compatibility distribution that preserves the current install and CLI experience while delegating behavior to core and control-plane artifacts.
terms.corePackage: Apache-friendly foundational runtime package that carries the reusable execution substrate.
terms.controlPackage: Higher-level operator and management package that will carry the separately licensed control-plane surfaces.
terms.compatibilityShell: Thin package layer that re-exports or dispatches into the new internal artifacts while the migration is in progress.
terms.packageTopology: The path and artifact map that defines which package owns each ecosystem role during the migration.
